Anthropic Claude: Elevated errors on Claude.ai (including login issues for Claude Code) — Resolved
summary: Between 14:17 and 17:11 UTC, our primary application database experienced severely degraded I/O performance following a routine maintenance operation, causing slow or failed requests on [Claude.ai](http://Claude.ai) and preventing new or refreshed sign-ins for Claude Code and the Console. API traffic via Claude Developer Platform was unaffected.

title: Anthropic Claude: Operational
summary: Status changed from Degraded Performance to Operational

title: Anthropic Claude: Elevated errors on Claude.ai (including login issues for Claude Code) — monitoring
summary: A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
